channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The QD-OLED gaming monitor that started it all got a big upgrade
item.description: Alienware is taking to this year's Computex 2026 in Taipei to announce some cool gaming monitors, most notably two exciting OLED options that are coming at different points this year. First off, the company is debuting the successor to its very first QD-OLED gaming monitor from 2022 with a refreshed design and high-end specs that's […]

item.title: Dell is bringing back the XPS 13 as a MacBook Neo competitor — with a temporary discount to $599
item.description: Dell is making good on its tease from CES and finally announcing a new XPS 13. The XPS 13 returns as a budget-friendly option, launching in July at a promotional student price of $599 - though that introductory deal only runs until September for back-to-school shopping; it'll start at $699 for everyone else. The $599 […]

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Monday, June 1 (game #1589)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Monday, June 1 (game #1086)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Monday, June 1 (game #820)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The new XPS 13 is Dell's answer to the MacBook Neo
item.description: It starts at just $599 for students or $699 for everyone else.

item.title: The Alienware AW3926QW is the world's first 39-inch 5K OLED monitor with an RGB stripe panel
item.description: Alienware is also releasing an updated 34-inch ultra-wide alongside new affordable 32 and 34-inch displays.

item.title: Protect up to 9 devices and save $154 on the AdGuard Family Plan
item.description: Save $154 on the AdGuard Family Plan, which helps block ads, trackers, malware, and inappropriate content across up to nine devices.

item.title: 4 tips for using hookup apps discretely — advice for Feeld, Tinder, AdultFriendFinder, and Grindr
item.description: How to use hookup apps discretely. Advice for AdultFriendFinder, Grindr, and more hookup apps.

item.title: Apple’s strategy for smart glasses is the same as smart watches
item.description: Apple isn't just looking to take on Meta in the smart glasses market; it's looking to upend eyewear as a whole, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. When the Apple Watch launched, it wasn't simply competing against the Pebbles and the Motorolas of the world. The company also had Swatch, Fossil, and Seiko in its crosshairs. […]

item.title: Erin Brockovich takes aim at data center secrecy
item.description: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has a new mission.
